Customer also requested with a requirement for a manifest, raising l3 for this

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1779781835200889

MCSL Customer reached out stating that around 54 Amazon shipments were picked up yesterday, however the shipment status is still not updated and continues to show as “Ready for Pickup” on the Amazon Shipping website.

For such scenarios, the customer mentioned that it becomes very difficult to identify and contact the respective carrier POCs quickly. Because of this, they have requested whether the current manifest generated from the app can be modifies similar to Shiprocket manifests.

Specifically, they would like the manifest to include:
- FE Name
- FE Signature
- Pickup/Seller details

The customer believes having these details directly in the manifest would help them coordinate faster with carrier representatives and handle pickup/tracking discrepancies more efficiently.

I have also attached a sample manifest from Shiprocket for reference.
Could you please check and let us know if this enhancement/customization is feasible from our end?

Store URL: shree-anandhaas-sweets-snacks.myshopify.com
Ac ID: 059270bd-5882-4ba7-b27b-05198f532b12
Plan: $19
Carrier : Amazon
597 orders in last 14 days
Total labels generated in May is 565
